The ELM implementation sets the upper age limit to **80 years**, whereas the CPG requires an upper age limit of **85 years** (30‑85 inclusive). All other numeric values (lower age limit of 30 years, LDL‑C threshold of ≥190 mg/dL, and the LDL Cholesterol value set) match the guideline.
